title:
DOUBLE MEAT PLEASE  •  ᴅᴍᴘ on Instagram: "Seabright deli is one of the best sandwich spots.

I had friends visiting from the city and wanted to take them to one of my personal favorite spots.

This mom and pop shop is about quality. They smoke their chicken and brisket (sadly the brisket sandwiches were sold out) and I’m in love with their new york style pastrami.

We got 4 sandwiches which were similar but also different and big favorites.

We grabbed the yatch club
Their smoked chicken, bacon, chedder, and their sun dried tomato aioli. 

The beach bum
New York pastrami, sauerkraut, and their house made thousand island with Swiss cheese on their rye.

The Surfer
Their house smoked chicken, bbq sauce, pickled onions, cheddar, and sun dried tomato aioli.

The Seabright.
Not shown, bc it was devoted instantly.
Pastrami, pickles, Swiss cheese, and the best coriander mustard aioli ever.

Check out @seabrightdeli and get some of the best sandwiches from some of the best people.

📍415 Seabright Ave
⏳Tuesday- Sunday. 11am-3:45pm

#doublemeatplease 
#diningwithdaniel

title:
Santa Cruz Bucket List on Instagram: "Bucket List worthy Pizza in Santa Cruz County! Add all of these new, hidden gem, and noteworthy pizza spots to your #santacruzbucketlist. Expanding the list from great classic pizza spots like @pizzamyheart and @woodstockscruz, this list of pizza spots features pizza creations that are buzzing right now! Whether you’re a #santacruzlocal or a visitor, definitely add these spots to your list:

1.) @venus_pie_trap: phenomenal New-haven style pizza pies and dessert pies! A true unique pie you have to try is the clam pizza! 
2.) @the_pizza_series: perfect Detroit style pizzas! Cheesy, crisp crust and decadent stacked toppings. The Sweet Heat is out of this world with a spicy Calabrian chili honey
3.) @bookiespizza: inside @rusticales, awesome unique flavor combos on Detroit style pizzas.
4.) @buzzopizza: classic Italian style woodfired pizzas with simple yet flavorful ingredients
5.) @sliceprojectpizza: thin New York style sliced and cheesy Detroit styles made with homemade sauces that will leave you craving more!
